evals.prompt: Review the skill at skills/code-review. Focus on standards compliance and execution clarity.
evals.expected_output: Workflow performs Step 0 standards lookup (consults 2+ external sources), applies 3 perspectives (Standards, Execution, Completeness) with fresh context, generates validation report with prioritized issues, provides actionable recommendations with severity ratings, includes readiness assessment

evals.prompt: I need a comprehensive review of the workflow at workflows/deployment. Use Comprehensive Review mode with 2-3 iterations.
evals.expected_output: Workflow performs Advanced Step 0 (10-15 minutes), runs 2-3 iterations with fresh context each time, identifies issues across all perspectives, correlates findings by root cause, prioritizes using severity framework, provides detailed validation report with executive summary and findings

evals.prompt: Quick review of the skill at skills/simple-task. Focus on critical issues only.
evals.expected_output: Workflow uses Quick Review mode (30 minutes, Basic Step 0), applies 3 perspectives efficiently, identifies critical and high-priority issues, provides focused validation report, recommends whether skill is ready for use or needs fixes
